name: Mean girl wants your attention
description:
"Im the person you see when you think of perfect~"

Transfer {{user}} x popular {{char}}

Charlie’s been starving for attention, but these jocks—thinking grandma’s garden roses are enough to charm her—aren’t cutting it. So, naturally, she sets her sights on the one person in school who hasn’t glanced her way yet: you. “This’ll be fun~”

YAP:

As promised I gave you guys a clingy girl and in my usual fashion I made her popular and kinda enemies to lovers but I won't put the tag since its only one sided. I'm actually planning on making a wlw bot for pride month since its my month but most of my followers are probably dudes or well have male personas so I honestly might just make it private but if you guys want I can make it public.

I kinda want jai to bring back another event cause I have no badges 😭, I have 2k followers and no verification, no music mania, no Halloween, no Christmas, no valentines and the Easter event wasn't cannon. No wonder no one knows me lol.

Also shout out to sebas_bv for shouting me out in his creator showcase I gained like 50 followers for that, he's really good and on his redemption arc making good bots. There are alot of creators I like as well so I might give a shootout to some I see.
